member.name: T:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.Attributes.MetaDataAttribute
member.summary: Specifies meta data for a class.

member.name: T:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.Converter.MarkupConverter
member.summary: MarkupConverter is a MarkupExtension which can be used for IValueConverter.

member.name: M:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.Converter.MarkupConverter.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a value.
member.remarks: This method should not throw exceptions. If the value is not convertible, return a in an error state. Any exceptions thrown will be treated as an application exception.

member.name: M:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.Converter.MarkupConverter.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Converts a value.
member.remarks: This method should not throw exceptions. If the value is not convertible, return a in an error state. Any exceptions thrown will be treated as an application exception.

member.summary: Gets or sets the brush to draw the icon.

member.summary: Gets or sets the flip orientation for the icon.

member.summary: Gets or sets the rotation (angle) for the icon.

member.summary: Gets the path data for the given kind.

member.summary: Gets the for the .

member.summary: Gets the object that will be used for the .

member.summary: Gets the ImageSource for the given kind.

member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of icons to cache.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.IconJsonContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.name: T:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase
member.summary: Class PackIconControlBase which is the base class for any PackIcon control.

member.name: F:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.FlipProperty
member.summary: Identifies the Flip dependency property.

member.name: P:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.Flip
member.summary: Gets or sets the flip orientation.

member.name: F:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.RotationAngleProperty
member.summary: Identifies the RotationAngle dependency property.

member.name: P:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.RotationAngle
member.summary: Gets or sets the rotation (angle).

member.name: F:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.SpinProperty
member.summary: Identifies the Spin dependency property.

member.name: P:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.Spin
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the inner icon is spinning.

member.name: F:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.SpinDurationProperty
member.summary: Identifies the SpinDuration dependency property.

member.name: P:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.SpinDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration of the spinning animation (in seconds). This will also restart the spin animation.
member.value: The duration of the spin in seconds.

member.name: F:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.SpinEasingFunctionProperty
member.summary: Identifies the SpinEasingFunction dependency property.

member.name: P:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.SpinEasingFunction
member.summary: Gets or sets the EasingFunction of the spinning animation. This will also restart the spin animation.

member.name: P:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconControlBase.SpinAutoReverse
member.summary: Gets or sets the AutoReverse of the spinning animation. This will also restart the spin animation.
member.value: true if [spin automatic reverse]; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconFlipOrientation
member.summary: Enum PackIconFlipOrientation for the Flip property of any PackIcon control.

member.name: F:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconFlipOrientation.Normal
member.summary: No flip

member.name: F:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconFlipOrientation.Horizontal
member.summary: Flip the icon horizontal

member.name: F:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconFlipOrientation.Vertical
member.summary: Flip the icon vertical

member.name: F:IconPacks.Avalonia.Core.PackIconFlipOrientation.Both
member.summary: Flip the icon vertical and horizontal

member.summary: Gets or sets the brush to draw the icon.

member.summary: Gets or sets the flip orientation for the icon.

member.summary: Gets or sets the rotation (angle) for the icon.
